track.name: Foundations
track.description: Core cybersecurity fundamentals and analyst mindset.

challenges.title: Mis-sent Email
challenges.description:
A support mailbox sent a spreadsheet to an unexpected external recipient.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the email and DLP evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Unexpected Redirect After Reload
challenges.description:
A web portal began redirecting users to an unexpected external destination after a configuration reload.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, compare the baseline and modified configuration, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Firewall DDoS Alert
challenges.description:
A firewall reported a large inbound surge before the customer portal began failing health checks.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, correlate the perimeter and service-health evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Backup Corruption
challenges.description:
A recovery restore operation failed during backup validation after primary storage loss.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the backup and restore evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Unexpected Snapshot Sharing
challenges.description:
A cloud database snapshot shows an unexpected sharing configuration change.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the snapshot attributes and cloud audit evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Repeated Payment Authorizations
challenges.description:
A payment workflow produced multiple successful authorizations for what should have been a single order.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the transaction and gateway evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Unusual SIEM Event Sequence
challenges.description:
A SIEM alert highlights an unusual change in security-event behavior on a production server.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, correlate the SIEM and host evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Unexpected Database Reachability
challenges.description:
A staging database service became reachable from outside its expected container network.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the container and host evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Files Suddenly Unusable
challenges.description:
Employees reported that business documents on a workstation suddenly became unreadable and a recovery note appeared.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the host impact evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Unexpected API Response Fields
challenges.description:
An API response included user fields that were not expected for this client context.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the request and response evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Unexpected Verification Logic Change
challenges.description:
A repository shows an unplanned change in payment verification behavior after a main-branch update.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the commit and review evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Unexpected Cloud Access Event
challenges.description:
A cloud audit event shows external access to a sensitive storage object.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the cloud audit and storage evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: Kubernetes Service Instability
challenges.description:
A Kubernetes workload began restarting repeatedly and service quality degraded sharply.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the Kubernetes health evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: DNS Traffic Surge Investigation
challenges.description:
A recursive DNS service received a large amplified traffic surge and query reliability degraded sharply.

Download the case pack, review the incident handoff, inspect the DNS and service-health evidence, and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: After-Hours Access
challenges.description:
The SOC team noticed successful SSH logins to production outside business hours.

Download the case pack and identify the suspicious external IP address from the authentication logs.

Flag Format
CTF{suspicious_ip}

challenges.title: Login Storm
challenges.description:
Authentication monitoring triggered after repeated failed login attempts against an admin account.

Download the case pack and identify the attack type based on the credential-attempt pattern.

Flag Format
CTF{attack_type}

challenges.title: Unknown Process
challenges.description:
Endpoint telemetry on a server includes a process that does not belong to the approved runtime baseline.

Download the case pack and identify the suspicious process name.

Flag Format
CTF{process_name}

challenges.title: Unexpected Sudo Activity
challenges.description:
A developer account executed privileged commands that were outside normal duties.

Download the case pack and identify which account escalated privileges.

Flag Format
CTF{username}

challenges.title: Midnight Upload
challenges.description:
Network monitoring detected large outbound transfer activity during off-hours.

Download the case pack and identify the file that was exfiltrated.

Flag Format
CTF{filename}

challenges.title: New Admin Session
challenges.description:
Administrative audit activity shows an unexpected privileged account creation event.

Download the case pack and identify the suspicious admin account.

Flag Format
CTF{account_name}

challenges.title: Unusual Web Request
challenges.description:
Proxy telemetry shows a workstation requesting a suspicious executable from an external website.

Download the case pack and identify the malicious domain.

Flag Format
CTF{domain}

challenges.title: Internal Audit Trail
challenges.description:
An audit event shows confidential payroll document access by a user outside the authorized department.

Download the case pack and identify the insider account.

Flag Format
CTF{username}

challenges.title: Strange Request Pattern
challenges.description:
Web access logs include unusual login query input that bypasses expected authentication behavior.

Download the case pack and identify the vulnerability being exploited.

Flag Format
CTF{vulnerability}

challenges.title: Shell History Review
challenges.description:
Incident responders recovered shell history from a compromised account.

Download the case pack and identify the command used to download the malicious script.

Flag Format
CTF{command}

challenges.title: The Data Leak
challenges.description:
The SOC team detected suspicious activity in the company document server.

Investigate the server logs and determine which CIA pillar was violated.

Downloadable File
server_access.log

Submit the flag in format:
CTF{pillar}

challenges.title: System Down
challenges.description:
A core authentication service was knocked offline for two hours. Identify the CIA principle impacted most.

Format: CTF{Answer}

challenges.title: Threat vs Risk
challenges.description:
Classify scenario elements into threat, vulnerability, and risk impact categories using standard risk terminology.

Format: CTF{Answer}

challenges.title: Identify the Vulnerability
challenges.description:
Review a short infrastructure scenario and identify which weakness is the actual vulnerability, not the threat actor or impact.

Format: CTF{Answer}

challenges.title: Attack Surface Mapping
challenges.description:
Map external and internal attack surfaces across web, API, exposed SSH, and human phishing vectors.

Format: CTF{Answer}

challenges.title: Insider Alert
challenges.description:
Investigate suspicious privileged activity and identify why the event pattern points to insider threat behavior.

Format: CTF{Answer}

challenges.title: Kill Chain Breakdown
challenges.description:
Given an intrusion timeline, map each attacker action to the correct kill chain stage.

Format: CTF{Answer}

challenges.title: MITRE Mapper
challenges.description:
Map observed attacker behavior to MITRE ATT&CK tactics and techniques at a foundational level.

Format: CTF{Answer}
